raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "affirmation of autonomous self-trust and internal validation",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "an individual possesses a reliable internal compass for truth",
    "external agreement is unnecessary for maintaining truth",
    "clarity exists as a stable internal state that can be accessed independently",
    "self-reliance in thinking and feeling is both possible and preferable"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent; all clauses reinforce the same theme of independence from external validation without contradiction",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "individuals can reliably distinguish accurate internal signals from bias or error, and external consensus mechanisms risk overriding valid personal insight",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the internal compass is distorted by unexamined assumptions or the domain requires empirical or intersubjective verification that solitary judgment cannot supply"
}
